text.title: Brand Voice Consistency System Core Rules
text.summary: Testable rules grounding the Brand Voice Consistency System methodology. Each pairs a binary check with a sourced rationale; HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override.

rule.statement: Voice doc names EXACTLY 5 attributes (e.g. direct, dry-humored, evidence-led, opinionated, brief). <5 = thin; >5 = nobody remembers.
rule.rationale: 5 attributes fit working memory; 3 is under-specified, 10 is unmemorable.

rule.statement: Voice doc includes 10 do/don't pairs with example sentences — NOT abstract adjectives. 'Use direct claims ("Faion is a CLI tool") not hedging ("Faion can be thought of as a CLI tool")'.
rule.rationale: Adjectives without examples are uninterpretable; pairs operationalise the abstraction.

rule.statement: ChannelChecklist names per-channel adaptations (length, formality, emoji policy, link density) for ≥3 channels. Without it, voice collapses to one channel's defaults.
rule.rationale: Twitter brevity ≠ blog depth ≠ docs precision; same voice but different surface expression.

rule.statement: VoiceDoc names a single voice owner. 'team' / 'we' / '' are forbidden.
rule.rationale: Plural ownership = no ownership; voice updates need a single decider.

rule.statement: Drift audit MUST run quarterly: sample last 90d output, score against voice doc, list deltas, decide refresh / retrain / no-op.
rule.rationale: Voice drifts unless audited; AI accelerates drift; quarterly is the minimum cadence.

rule.statement: If preconditions in AGENTS.md "Applies If" do not all hold, OR any "Skip If" disqualifier is true, do not run this methodology — route to the named alternative.
rule.rationale: Methodologies are pre-condition gated; running them out-of-scope produces noise and burns the agent's context budget.

rule.statement: If preconditions hold, execute the procedure in `content/04-procedure.xml` (or the rule set above when complexity is light), emit the artefact specified by `content/02-output-contract.xml`, and validate with `scripts/validate-brand-voice-consistency-system.py` before returning.
rule.rationale: Tying the entry rule to the validator script closes the loop between policy and machine check.
